question: Return the names of students whose highest single-course score exceeds the average score of the course 'AI Foundations'.
gold_sql: SELECT s.name FROM Students s JOIN Enrollments e ON s.sid = e.sid GROUP BY s.sid, s.name HAVING MAX(e.score) > (SELECT AVG(score) FROM Enrollments WHERE cid = (SELECT cid FROM Courses WHERE title = 'AI Foundations'));
